name: org.velocms/mcp
description: Draft, publish, and manage your VeloCMS blog from Claude, Cursor, or any MCP client.

environmentVariables.name: VELOCMS_SITE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Your blog's base URL, e.g. https://myblog.velocms.org or a bound custom domain

environmentVariables.name: VELOCMS_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key from your VeloCMS dashboard (Settings -> API Keys, Pro plan or higher)
